items.name: Silver Crossbow
items.description: Click to fire an arrow.  Each hit will cost your opponent 12 damage points. Occasionally, you will shoot a flaming arrow that does 65 damage points.

items.name: Steamgun
items.description: This powerful steamgun emits... you guessed it... steam!  Shoot a stream of steam at your foes to do damage.

items.name: Forest Bow and Arrow
items.description: These bows, often given as gifts by forest elves, can be used by anyone regardless of skill with a bow. Click to shoot and leave a flurry of leaves in your arrow's wake.

items.name: Nightmare Guitar
items.description: No stop signs, speed limit / Nobody’s gonna slow me down / Like a wheel, gonna spin it / Nobody’s gonna mess me around

items.name: Ninja Star Launcher
items.description: Your foes will just be seeing stars. They’ll never know what hit them.

items.name: Danger Mace
items.description: Swing this mace for massive damage to your opponent.  If that doesn't keep him away, surely your spiky shoulders will!

items.name: Battle Sleighs!
items.description: Just in time for winter - battle sleighs are here! Let the sleighing begin!

items.name: Microscope Launcher
items.description: Don’t just spread germs, fire them!

items.name: Coffee Cruiser
items.description: When you need coffee, make it come to you! Drive around using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle the headlight and 'H' to honk. Click with your mouse to fuel up on coffee yourself so you can keep cruising!

items.name: Attrition Blade
items.description: Your enemies won't last long with this blade on your side.

items.name: Zombie Crossbow
items.description: Click to fire an arrow, dealing 15 damage each. There is a 20% chance of poisoning your enemy, which does a about 15 more damage over a 4 second period, while slowing you down while it takes its effect.

items.name: Mechatronic Spider
items.description: All you makers out there will appreciate all the effort that went into making this robotic spider!  Send the spider (and his friends) to attack your foes.

items.name: Ninja Claws
items.description: These powerful attack claws allow you to slash at your foes in grand melee style!  Double click to slash both your claws at your foe and potentially push them to the ground.

items.name: Pirate Lieutenant's Cutlass
items.description: A mighty sword she be.  Only the mightiest of men might hope to wield her gracefully.

items.name: Sleepy Song Bird
items.description: What a sweet song.... zzzzz.  How can anyone stay awake when they hear this sweet music?  They can't!

items.name: Victrola
items.description: Play that old timey song and create a sonic blast - blowing people back and doing 20 damage.

items.name: Flying Magic Carpet
items.description: Fly through the skies of ROBLOXia on this magical carpet.

items.name: Time Bomb
items.description:
Black shell, white clock, Cadillac, / yeah
The bomb's a time bomb

items.name: Hyperbike
items.description: Solar powered awesome motorbike.  Travel at hyperspeed and leave a trail of burning light behind you.

items.name: Great White Mount
items.description: Take a bite out of the sky with this hovering friendly shark.
